hasAttributes.name: createdOn
hasAttributes.description: Date and time when the record was created.

hasAttributes.name: createdBy
hasAttributes.description: Unique identifier of the user who created the record.

hasAttributes.name: modifiedOn
hasAttributes.description: Date and time when the record was modified.

hasAttributes.name: modifiedBy
hasAttributes.description: Unique identifier of the user who modified the record.

hasAttributes.name: createdOnBehalfBy
hasAttributes.description: Unique identifier of the delegate user who created the record.

hasAttributes.name: modifiedOnBehalfBy
hasAttributes.description: Unique identifier of the delegate user who modified the record.

hasAttributes.name: ownerId
hasAttributes.description: Owner Id

hasAttributes.name: ownerIdType
hasAttributes.description: The type of owner, either User or Team.

hasAttributes.name: owningBusinessUnit
hasAttributes.description: Unique identifier for the business unit that owns the record

hasAttributes.name: owningUser
hasAttributes.description: Unique identifier of the user that owns the activity.

hasAttributes.name: owningTeam
hasAttributes.description: Unique identifier for the team that owns the record.

hasAttributes.name: timeZoneRuleVersionNumber
hasAttributes.description: For internal use only.

hasAttributes.name: UTCConversionTimeZoneCode
hasAttributes.description: Time zone code that was in use when the record was created.

hasAttributes.name: versionNumber
hasAttributes.description: Version Number

hasAttributes.name: activityId
hasAttributes.description: Unique identifier of the activity.

hasAttributes.name: activityTypeCode
hasAttributes.description: Type of activity.

hasAttributes.name: isBilled
hasAttributes.description: Information regarding whether the fax activity was billed as part of resolving a case.

hasAttributes.name: isRegularActivity
hasAttributes.description: Information regarding whether the activity is a regular activity type or event type.

hasAttributes.name: isWorkflowCreated
hasAttributes.description: Information regarding whether the activity was created from a workflow rule.

hasAttributes.name: priorityCode
hasAttributes.description: Priority of the activity.

hasAttributes.name: regardingObjectId
hasAttributes.description: Unique identifier of the object with which the activity is associated.

hasAttributes.name: regardingObjectTypeCode
hasAttributes.description: The name of the entity linked by regardingObjectId

hasAttributes.name: scheduledEnd
hasAttributes.description: Scheduled end time of the activity.

hasAttributes.name: scheduledStart
hasAttributes.description: Scheduled start time of the activity.

hasAttributes.name: sortDate
hasAttributes.description: Shows the date and time by which the activities are sorted.

hasAttributes.name: subject
hasAttributes.description: Subject associated with the activity.

hasAttributes.name: scheduledDurationMinutes
hasAttributes.description: Scheduled duration of the activity, specified in minutes.

hasAttributes.name: actualDurationMinutes
hasAttributes.description: Actual duration of the activity in minutes.

hasAttributes.name: actualEnd
hasAttributes.description: Actual end time of the activity.

hasAttributes.name: actualStart
hasAttributes.description: Actual start time of the activity.

hasAttributes.name: activityAdditionalParams
hasAttributes.description: Additional information provided by the external application as JSON. For internal use only.

hasAttributes.name: instanceTypeCode
hasAttributes.description: Type of instance of a recurring series.

hasAttributes.name: isMapiPrivate
hasAttributes.description: For internal use only.

hasAttributes.name: seriesId
hasAttributes.description: Uniqueidentifier specifying the id of recurring series of an instance.

hasAttributes.name: sentOn
hasAttributes.description: Date and time when the activity was sent.

hasAttributes.name: senderMailboxId
hasAttributes.description: Unique identifier of the mailbox associated with the sender of the email message.

hasAttributes.name: deliveryPriorityCode
hasAttributes.description: Priority of delivery of the activity to the email server.

hasAttributes.name: community
hasAttributes.description: Shows how contact about the activity originated, such as from Twitter or Facebook. This field is read-only.

hasAttributes.name: leftVoiceMail
hasAttributes.description: Left the voice mail

hasAttributes.name: deliveryLastAttemptedOn
hasAttributes.description: Date and time when the delivery of the activity was last attempted.

hasAttributes.name: exchangeItemId
hasAttributes.description: The message id of activity which is returned from Exchange Server.

hasAttributes.name: exchangeWebLink
hasAttributes.description: Shows the web link of Activity of type email.

hasAttributes.name: postponeActivityProcessingUntil
hasAttributes.description: For internal use only.

hasAttributes.name: description
hasAttributes.description: Description of the activity.

hasAttributes.name: stateCode
hasAttributes.description: Status of the activity.

hasAttributes.name: statusCode
hasAttributes.description: Reason for the status of the activity.

hasAttributes.name: transactionCurrencyId
hasAttributes.description: Unique identifier of the currency associated with the activitypointer.

hasAttributes.name: exchangeRate
hasAttributes.description: Exchange rate for the currency associated with the activitypointer with respect to the base currency.

hasAttributes.name: traversedPath
hasAttributes.description: For internal use only.

hasAttributes.name: processId
hasAttributes.description: Unique identifier of the Process.

hasAttributes.name: stageId
hasAttributes.description: Unique identifier of the Stage.

hasAttributes.name: SLAId
hasAttributes.description: Choose the service level agreement (SLA) that you want to apply to the case record.

hasAttributes.name: SLAInvokedId
hasAttributes.description: Last SLA that was applied to this case. This field is for internal use only.

hasAttributes.name: onHoldTime
hasAttributes.description: Shows how long, in minutes, that the record was on hold.

hasAttributes.name: lastOnHoldTime
hasAttributes.description: Contains the date and time stamp of the last on hold time.

definitions.description: Task performed, or to be performed, by a user. An activity is any action for which an entry can be made on a calendar.
